name: Finn Colton
learned: Finn Colton is a young orphan who discovers his power over the forbidden element of chaos. Despite his inexperience, he has a natural curiosity and a willingness to learn, driven by the need to understand and control his dangerous abilities.
currently: Finn Colton is training under the guidance of Master Alden to control his chaos magic. He struggles with the volatility of his powers but is determined to master them before they destroy everything he holds dear. Most of his days are spent learning elemental magic and trying to keep his chaos magic in check.
lifestyle: Finn Colton's life is filled with rigorous magical training and self-reflection. He wakes up early, practices magic with Master Alden, trains with Lira Ardent, and spends evenings studying his spellbook or exploring the Enchanted Forest. He has little time for rest, constantly driven by his desire to control his powers.
living_area: Magical Kingdom:Enchanted Forest:Wizard's Grove:Master Alden's Tower
